case_title: EDMUND GOMEZ VS. EOS RESTAURANT INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE DISCOVERY JUDGMENT RECOVERY AS TO DEFENDANT EOS RESTAURANT INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOING BUSINESS AS EOS RESTAURANT AND WINE BAR

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, EDMUND AS TO DEFENDANT EOS RESTAURANT INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOING BUSINESS AS EOS RESTAURANT AND WINE BAR JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
